title: Foundations
description: Build a rock-solid understanding of HVE Core architecture, the four artifact types, the RPI methodology, and collection-driven packaging.

title: The Four Artifact Types
description: Deep-dive into every artifact type — agents, instructions, prompts, and skills — their file formats, activation models, and how Copilot discovers them at runtime.

title: Authoring and Customization
description: Master custom artifact authoring, the Design Thinking coaching framework, and security planning agents that bring STRIDE and RAI assessment into structured AI workflows.

title: Operations and Mastery
description: Understand the validation infrastructure, extension packaging pipeline, CI/CD automation, enterprise scaling strategies, and how to contribute upstream.
